exam_price_notes: $400 approximate; fees vary by national member board.

testing_centers.notes: Pearson VUE used in the US; other national member boards may use different providers
Exams are administered by national member boards worldwide; delivery method and provider varies by country

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match registration exactly. Requirements may vary by national member board.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted. CTFL is the recommended prerequisite for all advanced and specialist levels. ISTQB certifications do not expire. Remote proctoring available in some countries; check with local member board.
renewal_options: ISTQB certifications do not expire and do not require renewal.

prerequisites.description: ISTQB Certified Tester Foundation Level (CTFL) required

retake_policy.notes: Retake policies are set by national member boards. Check with the relevant national board for waiting periods and fees.

Tool Support for Testing in the Automotive Domain
